overview: Ruins Golem is a SubBoss-class Construct/Elemental monster found in Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 1500 HP, 28 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 5. 7 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack6 at 200% ratio (560 base damage).

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 7 melee attacks. Attack1 (150%), Attack2 (180%), Attack3 (180%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Lose Balance
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Lose Balance icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Earth (-4000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 200
strategies.description: Has 200 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Attack6 (200% ratio)
strategies.description: Attack6 deals 560 damage at base (200% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
